evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement data quality checks; optimize database performance; Data Vault 2.0 knowledge; Strong SQL knowledge
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: quality checks, performance optimization, and advanced modeling methodologies (DataVault) dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: data models in modern warehouses; collaborate with stakeholders; quality checks
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: data platform role without explicit financial/regulatory consequence; operational reliability concern secondary.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Build transformation pipelines using dbt; Develop dimensional models; Implement data quality checks
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (dbt) in responsibilities, multiple modeling patterns (Kimball, DataVault), suggests growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design data models in modern warehouses; Build transformation pipelines using dbt; Implement data quality checks; Optimize database performance
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical ownership (modeling, pipeline building, quality checks, optimization) shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: collaborate with analysts and stakeholders; translate business needs into scalable solutions
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data platform infrastructure supporting analytics consumers and business users.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design; Build; Develop; Implement; Optimize; Collaborate with stakeholders
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate owns technical data modeling and pipeline work within stakeholder collaboration.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or expected AI skill from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement data quality checks; Data Vault 2.0 knowledge
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality checks framed as owned responsibility, indicating accountability for testing/validation.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement data quality checks; optimize database performance; collaborate with stakeholders
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality and performance optimization signal operational reliability concern, secondary to delivery.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build transformation pipelines; Develop dimensional models; Optimize database performance
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving and extending data warehousing infrastructure, not building from zero.
